name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugars in a mixing bowl.
2. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually combine flour, oats, baking soda, and cinnamon with the creamed mixture, alternating with pumpkin.
4. Fold in chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls onto greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12-13 minutes or until lightly browned.
